logic_model.impact: A connected and respectful Tasmania - Connection builds trust and respect builds fairness. Together they create the conditions for healthier communities, stronger services and better social, health and economic outcomes for everyone
logic_model.dimension: Respectfully and collaboratively activated with a focus on client journey to integrated health & wellbeing impact
logic_model.challenge: Tasmania experiencing high levels of psychological distress, poor relationship quality, isolation and lack of inclusion leading to reduced wellbeing and productivity

outcomes.description: Designing & delivering contemporary, inclusive relationship services that satisfy evolving wellbeing, connection & belonging needs and are co-designed with people with lived experience

Expanding our reach to support more Tasmanian individuals, families, communities and businesses in ways that are sustainable and effective in reducing the impact of trauma and leading to healthier, productive relationships and strong social outcomes
Positively influence public policy by using media, digital and social platforms to elevate trusted research and practical solutions to the societal pressures affecting communities
A strong reputation for delivering programs & supports which satisfy community needs enabling RA-Tas to meet its social impact, revenue and margin targets and progress our mission.
